shippingReturns:
Free shipping on orders $50+ and on every subscription order. Standard delivery 2 business days within the US. Expedited shipping available at checkout.

Not loving your purchase? Email us within 30 days of receipt for a full refund — you don't need to send the product back. See our Shipping Policy and Return Policy for full details.

toothpaste.details:
Built for sensitive teeth and gums. No SLS — a known canker-sore trigger. No hydrated silica, which is harder than enamel and abrades it over years.

Mechanism, not foam. Lauric acid disrupts decay-causing bacteria; aluminum-free baking soda neutralizes oral acid; wildcrafted myrrh sesquiterpenes calm inflamed gum tissue.

Food-grade or food-derived. Every ingredient. Safe for incidental swallowing; supervise young kids until they can spit reliably.

Honest trade-off. Closer to a gel than paste. Doesn't foam. Mint is essential-oil mild, not synthetic-amplified.
toothpaste.ingredients:
Purified spring water, organic virgin coconut oil, baking soda (aluminum-free sodium bicarbonate), xanthan gum, wildcrafted myrrh powder, organic stevia.

Variation essential oils:

  • Fresh Mint: organic peppermint, organic spearmint
  • All Natural: organic peppermint, organic spearmint, organic cinnamon, organic clove
  • Cinnamon Spice: organic cinnamon, organic clove
toothpaste.howToUse: Shake the bottle before use — coconut oil firms below 76°F, so the gel can settle. Squeeze a pea-sized amount onto a wet toothbrush and brush as you normally would for two minutes. It won't foam, and the mint will feel quieter than industrial paste — that's the formula working.

deodorant.details:
Aluminum-free, propylene-glycol-free. No chlorohydrate or zirconium plugging sweat ducts. No synthetic fragrance.

Lauric acid is the antimicrobial. Cold-pressed virgin coconut oil disrupts the lipid membranes of odor-causing bacteria — same mechanism, no irritation.

Skin-mirroring glide. Organic jojoba absorbs without leaving an occlusive film. Aluminum-free baking soda neutralizes the acidic environment odor bacteria need.

Honest trade-off. Roll-on goes on wetter than a stick. We work on odor, not perspiration. Patch test recommended for baking-soda-reactive skin.
deodorant.ingredients:
Purified spring water, organic virgin coconut oil, organic jojoba, plant-based emulsifying wax, grapefruit seed extract, sodium bicarbonate (baking soda).

Variation essential oils:

  • Geranium Flower: geranium, cedarwood, tea tree, patchouli
  • Calming Lavender: lavender, lemon, rosemary
  • Mountain Cedarwood: cedarwood, geranium, patchouli, tea tree
  • Wildcrafted Frankincense: frankincense, sandalwood
deodorant.howToUse: Shake before use. Roll onto dry underarms in two or three even strokes. Allow a moment to absorb before dressing — the formula goes on wetter than a stick. Coconut oil firms below 76°F; warm the bottle briefly in your hand if it's been stored cool. Patch test on the inner arm before daily use.

lotion.details:
Six clean ingredients. No mineral oil, petrolatum, dimethicone, or synthetic fragrance — the silicone-and-petroleum cocktail in most commercial lotions.

Mechanism-driven moisture. Cold-pressed virgin coconut oil delivers medium-chain fatty acids the skin barrier recognizes. Jojoba mirrors skin's own sebum and absorbs without a film.

Real antioxidants from unrefined red palm oil. Naturally occurring vitamin E and beta-carotene — the carotenoids refining strips out of conventional palm oil.

Honest trade-off. Texture varies because cold-pressed coconut oil firms below 76°F. Shake the bottle before the first pump if stored cool.
lotion.ingredients:
Purified spring water, organic virgin coconut oil, organic jojoba, plant-based emulsifying wax, organic grapefruit seed extract, organic red palm oil.

Variation essential oils:

  • Pure Unscented: none
  • Coconut Breeze: organic coconut oil extract
  • Rose Petal: rose, ylang ylang
  • Lavender & Rose: lavender, rose, roman chamomile, geranium
  • Calming Lavender: lavender
lotion.howToUse: Apply to clean, dry skin and massage in fully — the formula should absorb within minutes without sticky residue. If the lotion is firm in cold weather, warm a small amount between your palms before applying.

cream.details:
Beeswax barrier, not petrolatum. Locks moisture against the skin without sealing pores closed the way petroleum-based occlusives do.

Built for the customer who needs more than a lotion. Eczema-prone skin, extreme dryness, post-shower routines, hands-and-feet rescue, overnight occlusion.

Plant-based body, no synthetic thickeners. Palm stearic gives the cream its rich texture; cheaper alternatives use stearyl alcohol or PEG derivatives.

Honest trade-off. Closer to a balm than a pump cream. Firms in cold weather because beeswax does. Not for fast-absorption daytime use.
cream.ingredients:
Purified spring water, organic virgin coconut oil, plant-based emulsifying wax, palm stearic, grapefruit seed extract, organic beeswax, organic red palm oil.

Variation essential oils:

  • Coconut Breeze: organic coconut oil extract
  • Lavender & Rose: lavender, rose, roman chamomile, geranium
  • Calming Lavender: lavender
  • Rose Petal: rose, ylang ylang
  • Pure Unscented: none
cream.howToUse: Warm a small amount between your fingers to soften, then apply to dry skin. Best at night for overnight occlusion or after a bath. Pay extra attention to elbows, hands, and feet — areas where most lotions don't last long enough.

bar_soap.details:
One ingredient: saponified organic virgin coconut oil. No tallow (rendered animal fat). No SLS, SLES, EDTA, parabens, triclosan, or dyes.

True soap, not a synthetic detergent bar. Saponification produces real soap molecules and naturally occurring glycerin — most commercial bars strip the glycerin out and sell it separately.

Naturally rich lather. Coconut oil's lauric acid produces a fluffy, generous lather without synthetic foam boosters.

Honest trade-off. A coconut bar is harder than tallow-based commercial bars and lasts longer in a wet shower if drained between uses.
bar_soap.ingredients:
Saponified organic virgin coconut oil.

Variation essential oils:

  • Calming Lavender: lavender
  • Nourishing Tea Tree: tea tree
  • Refreshing Lemongrass: lemongrass, tea tree
  • Pure Unscented: none
bar_soap.howToUse: Lather between hands or onto a washcloth. Drain on a dry surface between uses — a coconut bar lasts noticeably longer with proper drainage than sitting in pooled water.

liquid_soap.details:
Built for the foaming dispenser. Designed for a foamer pump, not a standard pump. Aerates a small amount into a generous lather — less product per wash.

Same single-ingredient soap as the bar. Saponified organic virgin coconut oil. No SLS, SLES, cocamidopropyl betaine, propylene glycol, parabens, or triclosan.

True soap, not a surfactant cocktail. Cleansing comes from coconut soap molecules lifting oil and dirt — not sulfate detergents stripping skin's lipid layer.

Honest trade-off. Thinner than commercial pump soap. The 32oz refill is concentrated; check the dilution instructions before refilling.
liquid_soap.ingredients:
Saponified organic virgin coconut oil.

Variation essential oils:

  • Orange Zest: orange, bergamot, spearmint, lemon, grapefruit
  • Coconut Breeze: organic coconut oil extract
  • Calming Lavender: lavender
  • Pure Unscented: none
liquid_soap.howToUse: Use only with a foaming dispenser — a regular pump will dispense as runny liquid and waste most of it. Pump into hand, lather, and rinse. The 32oz refill is concentrated; dilute per the label instructions before refilling your foamer.

lip_balm.details:
Three ingredients, three jobs. Beeswax (true breathable barrier), virgin coconut oil (medium-chain fatty acids that nourish), unrefined red palm oil (vitamin E and tocotrienols).

No petrolatum, no lanolin, no synthetic flavoring. The chronic-chap problem we usually trace to one of those three ingredients.

No menthol cooling sensation. Many commercial balms add menthol to feel "treated" — that's mild irritation, not healing.

Honest trade-off. Firmer than a petrolatum-based balm because beeswax sets harder than petroleum wax. Apply with light pressure rather than a smear.
lip_balm.ingredients:
Organic virgin coconut oil, organic beeswax, organic red palm oil.

Variation essential oils:

  • Vanilla Dream: organic vanilla extract
  • Sweet Tangerine: tangerine, orange, lemon
  • Coconut Breeze: organic coconut oil extract
  • Pure Unscented: none
lip_balm.howToUse: Apply with light pressure to the lips — let the warmth of the lips soften the balm into place. Reapply throughout the day, especially in dry weather.
